name: smart-approval-intelligence
description: AI-powered approval intelligence system with risk prediction and auto-approval

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: npm run start:backend & npm run start:frontend
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.vercel-build: npm run install-all && cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf dist && cp -r frontend/dist dist
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
